evidence.claim: [NCOA6] Nuclear receptor coactivator 6 / PRIP — VERDICT: INEFFECTIVE for mTOR rescue (may modulate NLRP3 inflammasome). NCOA6 has at most an indirect PI3K/AKT/mTOR transcriptional link and is highly constrained; judged ineffective for mTOR rescue (separate NLRP3-inflammasome effect possible).
